title: Add Universidade Fada Madrinha to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Universidade Fada Madrinha](https://app.comunidadefadamadrinha.com) to learn
- Plataforma educacional de dropshipping com inteligência artificial, que inclui 13 assistentes virtuais, geração de imagens/vídeos, clonagem de voz e mais de 30 ferramentas para empreendedores brasilei

Fixes #10058

gist.headline: Fairy Godmother of Dropshipping
gist.blurb: A touch of magic for Brazilian entrepreneurs! Universidade Fada Madrinha just landed in our app showcase, bringing AI-powered dropshipping education and a whole suite of tools to the hive.
gist.summary: Added Universidade Fada Madrinha, an AI-powered educational dropshipping platform for Brazilian entrepreneurs featuring 13 virtual assistants and 30+ tools, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and explore this comprehensive Brazilian e-commerce and AI toolset in the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: 'Fada Madrinha' translates to Fairy Godmother. The scene should feature Polly the bee dressed as a fairy godmother (wand, little hat) sprinkling magic over e-commerce elements like shipping boxes or a digital storefront, representing the dropshipping education platform.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny sparkly fairy hat and holding a star wand, sprinkling magic dust over a small digital storefront and chunky pixel shipping boxes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
